ocr_findings.description: Image contains an illustration (factory conveyor scene) that is represented as an image placeholder in OCR — expected and acceptable for figures.
The サンプル問題 3-column table (利益/個, 工数/個, 生産能力/月) for A/B/C製品 is faithfully reproduced with correct values.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 04-04 生産管理の計算問題, a content page introducing production management calculation methods. Includes an introductory callout box, body text, a sample problem with a 3-column table, and 4-choice answer line (ア.15 イ.20 ウ.25 エ.30). Although it contains a sample question with choices, the page is instructional content introducing calculation method, not an exam page. OCR is highly faithful.
